name: Grade 1 Homestead Lab — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: Family and Consumer Sciences safety guidance
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Homestead Lab pathway.

units.title: Investigate: planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to planning a household task, care for shared spaces, and responsibility.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
